mapper.select:
SELECT tn.note_id AS noteId , tn.user_id AS userId , tn.drink_id AS drinkId , tn.title , tn.content , tn.rating , tn.created_at AS createdAt , tn.updated_at AS updatedAt , tn.is_deleted AS isDeleted , u.name AS userName , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.category_code AS categoryCode , cc.code_name AS typeName
FROM tasting_note tn
LEFT JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON d.type_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE tn.is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT tn.note_id AS noteId , tn.user_id AS userId , tn.drink_id AS drinkId , tn.title , tn.content , tn.rating , tn.created_at AS createdAt , tn.updated_at AS updatedAt , tn.is_deleted AS isDeleted , u.name AS userName , IFNULL(l.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount
FROM tasting_note tn
JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id , COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'NOTE' GROUP BY obj_id ) l ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id
WHERE tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY tn.rating DESC , tn.created_at DESC
ORDER BY tn.rating ASC , tn.created_at DESC
ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tasting_note tn WHERE tn.drink_id = #{drinkId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT tn.note_id AS noteId , tn.user_id AS userId , tn.drink_id AS drinkId , tn.title , tn.content , tn.rating , tn.created_at AS createdAt , tn.updated_at AS updatedAt , tn.is_deleted AS isDeleted , u.name AS userName , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.category_code AS categoryCode , cc.code_name AS typeName , IFNULL(l.likeCount, 0) AS likeCount
FROM tasting_note tn
LEFT JOIN user u ON tn.user_id = u.user_id AND u.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON d.type_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id , COUNT(*) AS likeCount FROM `like` WHERE obj_type = 'NOTE' GROUP BY obj_id ) l ON l.obj_id = tn.note_id
WHERE tn.note_id = #{noteId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT note_id AS noteId , user_id AS userId , drink_id AS drinkId , title , content , rating , created_at AS createdAt , updated_at AS updatedAt , is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM tasting_note WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT tn.note_id AS noteId , tn.user_id AS userId , tn.drink_id AS drinkId , tn.title , tn.content , tn.rating , tn.created_at AS createdAt , tn.updated_at AS updatedAt , tn.is_deleted AS isDeleted , d.drink_name AS drinkName , d.category_code AS categoryCode , cc.code_name AS typeName
FROM tasting_note tn
LEFT JOIN drink d ON tn.drink_id = d.drink_id AND d.is_deleted = 'N'
LEFT JOIN common_code cc ON d.type_code = cc.code AND cc.group_code = 'DRINK_TYPE' AND cc.use_yn = 'Y'
WHERE tn.user_id = #{userId} AND tn.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY tn.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tasting_note SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
UPDATE tasting_note SET is_deleted = 'Y' , updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
